
---
title: "Distance Preference Analysis"
output: html_notebook
---
```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
#Install only if needed
#install.packages("rlang")
#install.packages("ggplot2")
#install.packages("tidyverse")
#install.packages("likert")
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(likert)
library(ggstats)
library(dplyr)
```
# Read CSV
```{r}
raw_data <- read.csv("../processed/AllVisualisations_cleaned.csv", 
                     header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Remove first two rows (metadata?) and reset rownames
data <- raw_data[-c(1,2), ]
rownames(data) <- NULL

head(data)
```

```{r}
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)

distance_prefs <- data %>%
  select(Q2_1, Q2_2, Q2_3) %>%
  rename(
    Near   = Q2_1,
    Medium = Q2_2,
    Far    = Q2_3
  ) %>%
  # pivot to long so each row is one response
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "Distance", values_to = "Selection") %>%
  # split comma-separated selections into individual rows
  separate_rows(Selection, sep = ",") %>%
  mutate(
    Selection = str_trim(Selection),
    Distance = factor(Distance, levels = c("Near", "Medium", "Far"))
  ) %>%
  filter(Selection != "") %>%
  # count how many times each visualisation was picked per distance
  count(Distance, Selection) %>%
  mutate(Selection = factor(Selection, levels = c(
    "Arrow", "Radar", "Lights",
    "Arrow,Radar", "Radar,Lights", "Arrow,Lights"  
  )))
```

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=9}
pref_plot <- ggplot(distance_prefs, aes(x = Distance, y = n, fill = Selection)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "Preferred Visualisation by Distance",
    x = "Visualisation",
    y = "Number of Participants",
    fill = "Distance"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
  

ggsave(
  filename = "../graphs/Preference_By_Distance.pdf",
  plot = pref_plot,
  width = 9,
  height = 6,
  units = "in"
)
```
